mapper.sql: id, receiver_id, sender_id, type, title, content, data, is_read, create_time, read_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (receiver_id, sender_id, type, title, content, data, is_read, create_time, read_time) VALUES (#{receiverId}, #{senderId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{data}, #{isRead}, #{createTime}, #{readTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1, read_time = NOW() WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM notification WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} OR sender_id = #{userId}
